label: Change Control
desc: This is a standard process where all changes go through a formal approval step before they are deployed, which ensures that only authorized changes make it to production.

label: Approval
desc: Gate that approves changes before production release

label: Code Change
desc: Defines infra and config changes using Bicep and Ansible with DEV/PROD parameters so the same code is used for both environments

label: Code Testing
desc: After defining the changes, they go through a testing phase. This is crucial because it ensures that any code deployed will work correctly in the target environment. Depending on the setup these tests can be included in the CI\CD pipeline or run separately.

label: GitHub / AzureDevops
desc: GitHub and Azure DevOps are version control platforms that store Bicep and Ansible code and manage CI/CD workflows for building infrastructure and configuring resources. They facilitate collaboration, automate the deployment process, and ensure consistency across different environments (e.g., DEV/PROD) by integrating infrastructure as code (IaC) for Bicep and configuration management for Ansible.

label: Bicep Build
desc: CI\CD workflow for Bicep Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for Azure. For a multi cloud environment, this workflow can be extended to include Terraform for other cloud providers, ensuring consistent infrastructure deployment across different platforms.

label: Ansible Build
desc: CI\CD workflow that runs Ansible for Configuration Management

label: Azure Cloud Resources
desc: Azure-hosted infrastructure resources

label: Azure Arc
desc: Extends Azure management to hybrid and on-prem environments

label: Azure HCI
desc: Hyperconverged Infrastructure (HCI) combines compute, storage, and networking into a single, software-defined platform, simplifying management and scalability. It provides cost-effective, high-availability solutions for data centers, cloud, and edge computing environments.

label: OnPrem Resources
desc: On-site infrastructure systems

label: Azure Monitor/Alert
desc: Collects and analyzes logs,metrics and triggers alerts

label: Azure Sentinel
desc: Cloud SIEM for threat detection and security monitoring

label: Azure Policy
desc: Enforces compliance rules across Azure resources

label: Defender for Cloud
desc: Provides security posture management and vulnerability detection

label: Success
desc: Indicates successful deployment and triggers success workflow.

label: Failure
desc: Triggers rollback and failure handling workflow

label: Investigation / Fix / Deploy
desc: Failure triggers a rollback and investigation to diagnose issues. If a fix is required, it will be redeployed.

label: Mark Change as completed
desc: Closes the change request

label: Grafana Dashboard
desc: Visualizes metrics and monitoring data, providing a graphical representation of system health and performance over time. This can include a deployment dashboard that shows the status of ongoing deployments, success rates, and any issues encountered during the deployment process.
